steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank is the main verb with “Analyst” as the subject; the phrase “like other dactyls...” is parenthetical.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: The rule: the verb must agree in number with its subject. “Couples” is correct—it's singular. “Couple” is unconjugated; “are coupled” and “have coupled” use plural forms, violating subject-verb agreement. That matches choice C — C is correct.
